prompt:
// Material Icons re-exported with lucide-style names
// Replace: import { X } from "lucide-react"
// With: import { X } from "@/shim/lucide-react"

export {
  Dashboard as LayoutDashboard,
  People as Users,
  Chat as MessageSquare,
  Notifications as Bell,
  BarChart as BarChart3,
  Settings as Settings,
  Help as HelpCircle,
  Logout as LogOut,
  Group as Users,
  Search as Search,
  Add as Plus,
  Edit as Edit,
  Delete as Trash2,
  Security as Shield,
  ChevronRight as ChevronRight,
  ArrowBack as ArrowLeft,
  ArrowForward as ArrowRight,
  Send as Send,
  Person as User,
  SmartToy as Bot,
  OpenInNew as ExternalLink,
  Forum as MessageCircle,
  FilterList as Filter,
  Description as FileText,
  InsertDriveFile as File,
  Close as X,
  CircularProgress as Loader2,
  Refresh as RefreshCw,
  Upload as Upload,
  CalendarToday as Calendar,
  Email as Mail,
  Phone as Phone,
  LocationOn as MapPin,
  Whatshot as Flame,
  TrendingUp as Activity,
  Done as CheckCheck,
  Lock as Lock,
  CheckCircle as CheckCircle,
  EmojiEvents as Award,
  AttachMoney as DollarSign,
  School as GraduationCap,
  Error as AlertCircle,
  Visibility as Eye,
  VisibilityOff as EyeOff,
  Warning as AlertTriangle,
  TrendingUp as TrendingUp,
  FlashOn as Zap,
  VerifiedUser as ShieldCheck,
  DoneAll as CheckCheck,
} from '@mui/icons-material';
